facts.claim: Sapphire Princess is a cruise ship owned by Princess Cruises that entered service in 2004 as the sister ship of Diamond Princess.
At the time she was one of the world's largest cruise ships, with a capacity of 2,670 passengers and is the second Gem-class ship built by Princess Cruises.
Sapphire Princess was christened on 10 June 2004, in Seattle—the first cruise ship ever to be christened in that port.
